description.ko: 유리 프리즘을 통과하는 백색광이 현실적인 광학 효과와 함께 선명한 무지갯빛 스펙트럼으로 분산되는 환상적인 시각화.
description.en: A stunning visualization of white light passing through a glass prism, breaking into a vibrant spectrum of colors with realistic optical effects.

prompt: A hyper-realistic close-up of a triangular crystal prism on a dark reflective surface. A sharp beam of white light enters from the left, refracting through the glass and dispersing into a brilliant, soft-focus rainbow spectrum on the right. Caustics, chromatic aberration, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, ethereal atmosphere, macro photography.
